content.en:
Soon.

Ye Tian arrived at the Realm Court Headquarters, and the high-level Realm God representatives of other top forces also came here.

Normally, there were very few high-level realm gods in the realm court headquarters, but at this moment, there were incomparably few, and the figures of high-level realm gods could be seen everywhere.

After all, there are more than a dozen top forces in the Dongwu Realm, and the Dongwu Realm is the last among the many Realm God Kingdom realms, so you can imagine how many top forces there are in the Realm God Kingdom Realm.

With so many top forces, they all sent representatives, so naturally there were many high-level realm gods.

Here, Ye Tian also met an old acquaintance, the Guya Realm God of the Dongwu Ancient Sect.

This Guya Realm God came to participate in this meeting on behalf of the Dongwu Ancient Sect.

"God of the Ancient Realm!"

Ye Tian went over to say hello.

When the Guya Realm God saw Ye Tian, he was also extremely amazed: "Ye Tian Realm God, we have met again, I didn't expect that in such a short period of time, you will develop the human race to the top power, and you also have such terrifying combat power!"

Ye Tian chatted briefly with the Guya Realm God for a while.

Suddenly, Ye Tian asked, "Guya Realm God, do you know what this meeting is about?"

He has only not long become a high-level realm god, and the human race has only only become a top force not long ago, and with well-informed information and connections, he is naturally far inferior to the god of the ancient Ya realm.

That's why he wanted to know a little bit of information from the gods of the Ancient Realm.

The God of the Ancient Realm muttered, "To be honest, I don't know very well, but there is a rumor that this meeting is an organization of supreme forces, and it is said to have something to do with the sudden restoration of the Eternal Realm. "

"Something to do with the sudden restoration of the Eternal Border?"

Ye Tian was slightly surprised.

In fact, he was also very curious about why the Eternal Realm suddenly recovered, but there was no sign at all before, so it recovered suddenly, and it didn't take too long to restore the entire Eternal Realm to its original state.

This is really abnormal.

You must know that the origin of the Eternal Kingdom Boundary was extremely incomplete before, and it was picked up by the Boundary God Realm, and even the Boundary Court Headquarters almost completely abandoned the Eternal Realm, and did not send the Boundary God to guard it.

The Demon Seed Abyss side also didn't value the Eternal Realm, otherwise it wouldn't have sent only a few middle-level Demon Seeds and a group of ordinary Eternal Realm God Realm Demon Seeds to invade in the first place.

You must know that any powerful force is far more than this combat power, which shows that both sides do not attach importance to the Eternal Border.

Obviously, they all thought that there was no possibility of the Eternal Realm being restored, and as a result, it was not long before the Eternal Realm suddenly recovered, and it was not expected at all.

So, something big must have happened in it.

But the top forces don't know the reason for this kind of big thing, but those supreme forces definitely know.

Perhaps this meeting will reveal the truth.

......

As time passed, representatives of the top powers came.

this day.

The meeting began.

In an incomparably magnificent hall, a high-level realm god was ushered in on the dense void throne.

These high-level realm gods sat on these seats, except for those main seats, the other seats were not divided into primary and secondary, and all the high-level realm gods sat down one after another.

And above those main seats, a series of figures suddenly appeared.

These figures gradually condensed, and a faint trace of aura made Ye Tiandu secretly shocked.

He could sense the horror of these figures, and they were definitely beyond the existence of a high-level peak realm god.

Ye Tian said darkly.

He had never seen a peak realm god, because the top forces almost did not have a peak realm god, and a top force like the Dongwu Ancient Sect was only a high-level peak realm god, and there was no peak realm god.

Except for a very small number of the top top forces, there will be peak realm gods.

If you have more than three Peak Realm Gods and more than ten high-level Peak Realm Gods, you can apply to become a supreme force.

But the realm of the gods has been infinite for years, and there is no supreme power. []

For a long time, the number of supreme forces in the realm of the Realm God Kingdom was one hundred and sixty-two, and most of the supreme forces were very mysterious, and they hardly appeared, and even if the demon seed invaded the realm of the Realm of God, they could not be seen.

Perhaps these supreme forces who are blocking the abyss of the demon seed in other places will not be seen by ordinary forces.

Ye Tian was also extremely surprised when he first learned about the number of supreme forces, after all, there were too many supreme forces.

However, if you think about it carefully, it is almost impossible for the supreme force to fall, and it is very reasonable to have so many supreme forces after countless years of accumulation.

"Each of these peak realm gods can easily kill me!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he no longer has arrogance at the moment.

Compared to these peak realm gods, he was still very weak.

Soon.

One of the pinnacle realm gods, the Stasis Realm God, spoke.

The Stasis Realm God comes from the Ice Realm Gate, one of the supreme forces, and the Ice Realm Gate is also extremely powerful, far beyond the ordinary supreme forces.

Therefore, the Stasis Realm God spoke as a representative of the supreme forces this time.

"'Ladies and gentlemen, this time you have been summoned here for an important matter to discuss. Everyone should know that not long ago, the Eternal Realm suddenly returned to its original state. In fact, we, the supreme forces, did not expect it. According to our previous judgment, it is almost impossible for the Eternal Realm to be restored, and even if all the supreme forces join forces, it will not be possible for the Eternal Realm to be restored. The Stasis God said.

Many high-level realm gods were extremely surprised, all the supreme forces joined forces and could not restore the Eternal Realm, so how did the Eternal Realm recover?

The Stasis God continued: "The Eternal Realm, the Realm God Realm (Hao Li's), and the Demon Seed Abyss, these three realms are the three great realms of the Death Void that are connected to each other, and the place where these three realms converge is the realm of the seams. At the beginning, the Eternal Realm was shattered to its origin, and itself was eroded by the Void of Death, and the Endless Territory turned into a Death Zone. Our major supreme forces joined forces, and only then did the Eternal Decree draw on the scattered origin to open up the Eternal Realm, which could barely support the basic operation of the Eternal Realm. "

Hearing this, many high-level people somewhat understood.

But Ye Tian heard of the Death Void for the first time.

However, he did not ask, but continued to listen.

The Stasis God said: "Not long ago, in the Void of Death, a broken stump ran through the Eternal Realm and fell into the origin of the Eternal Realm, originally we didn't care, until the Eternal Realm suddenly recovered, and we realized that the Eternal Realm could be restored, it should be the effect of the broken stump. "。
